requirements.title: Implement full CRUD for operator entity
requirements.summary: The system must support create, read, update, and delete operations on the operators table. This covers the complete lifecycle of an operator record, from initial creation through modification to removal. The client spec (Operator_spec.pdf v1.0) lists this as item 1.
requirements.rationale: Explicitly listed as item 1 in the attached functional specification from the client.

requirements.title: Add server-side operator search with pagination
requirements.summary: Users must be able to search operators by name, phone number, or assigned outlet. Filtering must happen server-side (not client-side) and results must be paginated. This is item 2 in the client spec.
requirements.rationale: Explicitly listed as item 2 in the attached functional specification from the client.

requirements.title: Enforce role-based access control on operator management
requirements.summary: Three roles govern access to operator records. Admin gets full CRUD permissions. Supervisor can view and comment only. Operators can view their own record but cannot edit or delete. This is item 3 in the client spec.
requirements.rationale: Explicitly listed as item 3 in the attached functional specification with per-role breakdown.

requirements.title: Record audit log for all operator CRUD actions with 90-day retention
requirements.summary: Every create, update, and delete action on an operator record must produce an audit log entry capturing the actor, timestamp, and a before/after snapshot of the changed fields. Audit records must be retained for at least 90 days. This is item 4 in the client spec.
requirements.rationale: Explicitly listed as item 4 in the attached functional specification with retention period stated.
